turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. Mujhe ek cheque se payment karni thi. Kya aap cheque accept karte hain?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ji, hum cheque accept karte hain. Aapka naam aur invoice number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan dekha. Amount hai 8,750 rupaye. Cheque Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic Pune ke naam se banana hoga. Aap personally aa ke billing counter pe de sakte hain ya courier bhi kar sakte hain.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Main khud aakar dunga. Kal chal sakta hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bilkul, kal billing counter subah 9 baje se 6 baje tak khula hai. Aapka swagat hai.
